form.formComment: Comes off a (19.16) win last time, scoring by one length in a Grade 5 over 330m at Temora. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Looks a key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 400m. Last start finished 7th over 400m at this track beaten 10 lengths (23.16) behind Moo Move in a Grade 5/6 on March 31. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.
